---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the problem this feature addresses.

## Proposed solution
How would you like it to work?

## Does this stay local-first?
All features must run fully offline. If your feature requires a cloud service, it won't be accepted into core (but could be a plugin).

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you considered.
